attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
COALESCE(SNMATD.PROV_REL_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') PROVISION_RELEASE_TYPE_CD,
SCMA.CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT_KEY         AS             CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
COALESCE(SNMATD.RAE_REL_AMT,0) 	PROVISION_RELEASE_USD_AMT,
(CASE WHEN SNMATD.ATTRIBUTE11='Y' THEN SNMATD.CREATION_DATE ELSE CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) END) AS 	EDW_CREATE_DTM,
(CASE WHEN SNMATD.ATTRIBUTE11='Y' THEN 'E_MIGRATION_BATCH' ELSE USER END) 			AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
SNMATD.ACTION_CODE ACTION_CODE,
'I' DML_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS SNMATD 
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON NAR ON (SNMATD.RC_ID = NAR.SK_REASON_ID_INT)
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT SCMA
        ON      (SCMA.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = SNMATD.TRANSACTION_ID AND SCMA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE = 'PROVISION' )
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_SUBREASON NASR ON (SNMATD.SRC_ID = NASR.SK_SUBREASON_ID_INT)
WHERE COALESCE(SNMATD.PROV_REL_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') IN ('USAGE','RECLASS','NEGATIVE PROVISION','UNKNOWN')
UNION ALL
SELECT 
COALESCE(ENMATD.PROV_REL_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') PROVISION_RELEASE_TYPE_CD,
SCMA.CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT_KEY         AS           CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
COALESCE(ENMATD.RAE_REL_AMT,0) 	PROVISION_RELEASE_USD_AMT,
(CASE WHEN ENMATD.ATTRIBUTE11='Y' THEN ENMATD.CREATION_DATE ELSE CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) END) AS 	EDW_CREATE_DTM,
(CASE WHEN ENMATD.ATTRIBUTE11='Y' THEN 'E_MIGRATION_BATCH' ELSE USER END) 			AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
ENMATD.ACTION_CODE ACTION_CODE,
'I' DML_TYPE
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS_A ENMATD 
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON NAR ON (ENMATD.RC_ID = NAR.SK_REASON_ID_INT)
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT SCMA
        ON      (SCMA.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = ENMATD.TRANSACTION_ID AND SCMA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE = 'PROVISION')
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_SUBREASON NASR ON (ENMATD.SRC_ID = NASR.SK_SUBREASON_ID_INT)
WHERE COALESCE(ENMATD.PROV_REL_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') IN ('USAGE','RECLASS','NEGATIVE PROVISION','UNKNOWN')

PROD_SUB_NET_AMT              ,

ACTION_CODE,
'RI'	EXCEPTION_TYPE                
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS SNMATD
WHERE NOT EXISTS 
(SELECT * FROM $$WORKDB.W_CCRM_MNL_ADJUST_PROV_REL WCMAPR
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT  SCMA
ON SCMA.CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT_KEY = WCMAPR.CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT_KEY AND  
SCMA.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = SNMATD.TRANSACTION_ID)
